Dire Wolf-Hide Cloak  
 

Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 8
STR: +6 STA: +6 HP: +35
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Dire Wolf-Hide Cloak
Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 8
STR: +6 STA: +6 HP: +35
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Dire Wolf Hide Cloak
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1412
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 08:24:31
Page Updated:Thu Mar 21st, 2013

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
Captain Bvellos
Staff Sergeant Drioc


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel

stats

Uploaded November 27th, 2019 by stickleback
Send a correction
Post Comment
Junk
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2003 at 7:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257493135
321 posts
Lmao u think this cloak is junk yet it took you 8 minutes to take a mob that 4 people ranging from level 48-59 took in about half the time...He casts very smal heals on himself and he runs oom quickly. I needed 2 CH's and a few spot heals, you do not need a "force" to take this guy down. If your group can clear the bank area, then you can own this guy. And he does not need to be single pulled because we had an add, and just root it, mez it, or stick a pet on it....

Edited, Mon Jun 30 19:23:01 2003
▲ Page top
hehe
QuoteReply
# May 29 2003 at 12:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362309917
4 posts
took him out with me a 61 druid and a 65 SK in bout 8 min =) BTW the cloak is junk
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 07 2002 at 3:30 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) yea i have this on my necro for the str and sta on its for more hp and so i can have a bit stronger carriage lol since my intel is a 204 already and with a kei it is at 230 so lol i picked this for extra hp and these sell for 1.5k-2k on the seventh
Who drops it
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2002 at 1:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771236046
32 posts
Captain BVellos (Sp?)
We had at least 2 groups to take him down. He hits for over 200. Took many down the first time we accidentally pulled him. You need to single pull him if you have a small force. Planned out we had no trouble. I think he's around the bank area, or the wakening lands zone up the ramp a little ways. Dont take my word for it though, i'm not too familar with the zone.
▲ Page top
RE: Who drops it
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 4:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771853151
153 posts
Dropped by the Captain. He spawns near the bank and then starts walking to the arena ramp area. He has a lot of HPs and cast heal on himself. It's a long fight. I think our tank needed 6 CHeals during that battle.
▲ Page top
RE: Who drops it
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2002 at 10:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769682424
44 posts
He's very doable and single pullable by a small 55+ group .. he's really not that tough, but if your lower level he may seem like a brute .. we pull him as if he was a common mob and no i'm not in an uber guild ,)

Nineva Delamortei
59th season Revenant
Luclin
▲ Page top
Who drops this?
QuoteReply

# Jul 12 2003 at 3:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Pricing data only accepts prices in whole amounts of platinum, so when enter a price just round to nearest pp and enter that, don't try entering the gold, silver and copper.

# Apr 02 2002 at 3:40 PM Rating: Decent

Well Grats on getting such a cool cloak for such a good price off a merchant anyway :)

LOL, remember when Splitpaw first became a nasty dungeon, and the gloves from the gnolls outside were fetching 4K from high level druids over-excited at finding a glove with +2 Wis on it? My guild picked up two pairs at a couple of pp each just by checking the merchants around the area...

800 plat on Nameless. Normal price is 1200-1600 though.. I just wait out til I find a good bargain.
▲ Page top
RE: Ignore the price
QuoteReply
# May 07 2002 at 8:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754601941
41 posts
I got it for under 2K, I got it for free, a ranger in GD sent me a tell asking what I had for a back item, I told him cloak of the icebear, he said come to the FG fort then, so I did and he handed me this, said someone gave it to him so he was passing it on, I also am a ranger, so when I get a better back piece some lucky young ranger is gonna get it for free to... I believe in tradition. He then asked what weapons I had and I told him, he said NM cuz mine where good... I wonder what he was gonna give me ;)
BTW I use a sword of skyfire and a Centi SS... good fast combo I do lost of quads for 30+ that 120pts of damage for those that are slow at math, I tend to pull taunt and out damage my paladin buddies but hey I am a crazy ranjah.

Oh and it goes for 1-2K on Prexus BTW
▲ Page top
Cool back piece
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 8:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772990398
4 posts
Just cos its light weigth, doesnt necessarily make it a monk only. My warriors now wearing, haha! lvl 48 and still had splinted bronze on, definite upgrade! =)

48th Ring of the Steel Warriors
Brell Serillis

QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 9:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
That does it! What, is every friggin cloak in the game Monk only?!

Almost every cloak in the game is lightweight! That doesn't mean that every damn cloak that drops should go to Monks!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 15 2001 at 11:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ohh yeah the stats just scream MONK ONLY i want anyone on e-marr with info on who exactly drops it and at what level i could take him in a group lemme know
Great Monk item

# Oct 05 2001 at 2:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249381110
16 posts
This is a great Monk twink item. Got one on my lvl 23 monk. Now he has 124stamina with his Netted Kelp armor and hp stuff. 860hp is nice for a low lvl monk =)


Sequel of the Mythic Legion
57th Templar of Innoruuk ~He's not such a bad guy~

# May 22 2001 at 6:10 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This item is also a Quest Reward.

You turn in the Seal off the Shardwing Courier in Western Wastes to Capt. Bvellos in Kael. He will reward you with this Cloak.

I know cuz i did it. =)

Talonhar Thundersoul
60th Hierophant of Veeshan

Do the surrounding giants attack if you try to take down one of the domesticated?
▲ Page top
RE: Aggro?
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2003 at 3:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Yep, they sure do.

However, despite this item's name, dire wolves DO NOT drop this item. Drops off a few named giants, but never off of dire wolves.

umm nope:) drops off of some guy that is near the captain.... just know that he was named and hits hard, was in a 2 group raid and got this, rolled a 945/1000:)

#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 05 2001 at 9:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is a quest items! you need a dire wolf skin and other stuff.

# Feb 07 2001 at 4:51 AM Rating: Default

No, you are thinking of the Direwolf Fur cloak. That is the quest item. The Dire Wolf-hide Cloak ia dropped item.
